heading: Generate an Autocompletion Script
body:
**Bash:**

Bash

To learn how to generate the autocompletion script for Bash,
see [atlas completion bash](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-completion-bash).

**Fish:**

fish

To learn how to generate the autocompletion script for fish,
see [atlas completion fish](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-completion-fish).

**Powershell:**

PowerShell

To learn how to generate the autocompletion script for PowerShell,
see [atlas completion powershell](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-completion-powershell).

**Zsh:**

zsh

To learn how to generate the autocompletion script for zsh,
see [atlas completion zsh](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-completion-zsh).
